title: TIP-1.0 Pak — Portable AI Knowledge bundle
description: A Pak is a portable, AI-ready knowledge bundle that can be injected into prompts, handed off across sessions, or shared across agents. The 5 canonical subtypes (Vault / Interaction / Decision / Recall / Handoff) are defined by the MultiPak specification. Local-only — Pak content NEVER crosses the license-validation egress boundary. See https://docs.tokenpak.ai/protocol/multipak-pak.

pak_id.description: Stable opaque identifier (recommended ULID/UUID prefixed by 'pak_').

pak_type.description: Canonical Pak subtype per the MultiPak specification. Deprecated aliases (project/memory/context) are accepted on read for backward compatibility (target removal: v3.0.0); receivers normalize to canonical.

summary.description: Concise summary of the Pak content. Used at context-level recall_summary (recall level 2).

project.description: Project identifier; recall hard-filters on this when an explicit project_scope is declared.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 of the original source bytes.

authority.description: Source-of-truth weight applied in recall ranking. user_approved > file_source > tool_result > llm_generated.

anchors.description: Content-addressed references to exact source text. Hydration restores snippet bytes from the anchor store at ~/.tokenpak/pro/state/multipak/anchors/<source_hash>.

class.description: Privacy classification. v1 admits local_only only. Additional classes require their own specification amendment.
